category_title: Students who make disruptive noises to gain teacher attention during independent work
scenario_title: Independent math work while teacher is occupied
minimal_context: Tom is supposed to be completing independent math work while the teacher is occupied with another student.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is time for independent math work. Please work on your assignment while I help another student.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Does not raise his hand) Hoo! (Makes a short, high-pitched noise)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: I am busy working with another student right now.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Forgets to raise his hand) Eeee! (Makes another high-pitched noise to get the teacher to come over)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please continue your independent math work quietly.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Makes a series of high-pitched noises that occur in short bursts, like a shriek, a hoot, and a yell)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: It is time for independent math work. Please work on your assignment while I help another student.

STUDENT: (Does not raise his hand) Hoo! (Makes a short, high-pitched noise)

TUTOR: I am busy working with another student right now.

STUDENT: (Forgets to raise his hand) Eeee! (Makes another high-pitched noise to get the teacher to come over)

TUTOR: Please continue your independent math work quietly.

STUDENT: (Makes a series of high-pitched noises that occur in short bursts, like a shriek, a hoot, and a yell)

context.environment: classroom during independent math work time
context.social_setting: the teacher is working with someone else

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: when the teacher is busy working with another student
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: makes a series of high-pitched noises that occur in short bursts, like a shriek or a hoot or a yell
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: wants power from the teacher to get teacher attention; finds it too easy to just make the noises and cannot remember to raise hand
related_quotes: when I’m busy working with another student I hear it a lot
he does get me to come over to him every time, so there is a lot of power
it’s too easy for him to just make the noises, and I can’t get him to remember

behavior_patterns.condition: when he wants teacher attention during independent work
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: makes a series of high-pitched noises that occur in short bursts instead of raising his hand
related_quotes: Tom doesn’t do that very often
a series of high-pitched noises that occur in short bursts
